global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with abstract shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, are centered in the ad, rendered in a lighter shade of blue.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Secure & simple' is prominently displayed in bold, white font, conveying a clear and inviting message.

elements.label: Additional message text
elements.description: The phrase 'No hidden fees' appears below the main message in a smaller, white font, adding clarity to the offer.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the bottom of the ad reads 'Learn more' in bold, white text against a blue background.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'EarnPath' is displayed in a small, white font at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is positioned near the abstract shapes, adding a decorative touch to the overall design.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with geometric shapes, secure & simple messaging
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Secure & simple, No hidden fees, Learn more, EarnPath
